selected_tasks.body_preview: Extend crash diagnostic capture to cover harness startup failures and context loading failures — two paths that caused silent crashes during Days 100-102 with zero diagnostic visibility. Why this matters: The crash reporter (stash_diagnostic_error / take_diagnostic_error in state.rs) exists but is only called from state init failure in src/lib.rs line ~1032.
selected_tasks.title: Wire crash reporter into harness startup and context loading failure paths

selected_tasks.body_preview: Extract the failure, crash, and diagnostics sub-handlers from the 23,848-line commands_state.rs into a new src/commands_state_diagnostics.rs module. This is the first step of splitting the largest file in the codebase (16.5% of all source). Why this matters: commands_state.rs is a single-file switchboard of ~200 sub-handlers at 23,848 lines. It's been flagge
selected_tasks.title: Extract diagnostics sub-handlers from commands_state.rs into new module

selected_tasks.body_preview: Wire the crash diagnostic reporter into DeepSeek transport failure paths so that protocol-level errors (context length, timeouts, network failures, malformed responses) are captured and visible via /state crashes. Why this matters: The DeepSeek transport layer in deepseek.rs already has detailed error classification (DeepSeekTransportErrorClass) and state ev
selected_tasks.title: Capture DeepSeek transport failures as diagnostic errors
